sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74734" key="o(rauge/omai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὁραυγέομαι</orth>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">ὁράω, αὐγή</etym>) <sense id="n74734.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">inspect closely,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aesar.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Stob.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.49.27</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
